ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor) */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application of the component (e.g., power supply, signal processing) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the testing condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_conditions" (
  "pc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter condition */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter under the condition */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter under the condition */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter under the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter condition was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter condition was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_conditions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tested */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the test */,
  "tested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the test */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the test results */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test results were approved */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tests_tested_by FOREIGN KEY ("tested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tests_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "condition_value" TEXT /* Value of the condition during the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test condition was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test condition was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the test condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES component_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project using the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application entry was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application entry was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_applications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_applications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project information was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
